ksa_text: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments using established methodologies, documenting findings, risk ratings, remediation recommendations, and continuous monitoring integration with governance structures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop methods to monitor and measure risk, compliance, and assurance efforts.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Develop methods to monitor and measure risk, compliance, and assurance efforts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance falls outside the primary competency scope of the VP Data Engineering. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Regulatory Compliance truly out-of-scope for the VP Data Engineering? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Regulatory Compliance as a core or recommended competency for the VP Data Engineering. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Regulatory Compliance falls outside the established competency profile for the VP Data Engineering. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance is outside the competency scope of the VP Data Engineering. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
